message:
🐛 Add null guards to fix ksc_error 3.6× spike (#10957) (#10990)

- useDeployMissions: guard clusterStatuses/targetClusters with (x || [])
  before .map/.some/.find — localStorage data may have missing arrays
- loadMissions: normalize parsed data to ensure required arrays exist
- Missions.tsx: guard mission.clusterStatuses before .length/.filter/.map
- WorkloadDeployment.tsx: guard workload.targetClusters (typed optional)
  before .map/.some/.length/[0] access across 7 call sites
- useProviderHealth: guard cacheResult.data before .filter

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
